function.name: validate_sunculture_agent
function.description: Validates a SunCulture employee/agent in the internal AMT directory using their registered mobile number. Use as the first step when the person wants to create a lead, check commissions, or similar agent-only workflows. Ask for their phone number in Kenya format (07… or 2547…) before calling. If lookup fails, say their details could not be verified.

phone.description: Mobile number on the agent's SunCulture profile (e.g. 254748717044 or 0748717044)

inquiry_type.description: What the user is trying to do (optional context)
